prompt: Photorealistic, 8k, HIGH-RESOLUTION PHOTOGRAPH, A 22 year old beautiful Scandinavian model with a slim waist, long legs , long blonde hair, tall athletic, in a living room apartment, looking over her shoulder in a dark navy blue sleeveless lace gown. Her accessories include multiple silver necklaces. She is further embellished with sparkling crystal drop earrings. The lighting is soft and atmospheric, highlighting her porcelain skin against a dreamy, living room background
promptEn: Photorealistic, 8k, HIGH-RESOLUTION PHOTOGRAPH, A 22 year old beautiful Scandinavian model with a slim waist, long legs , long blonde hair, tall athletic, in a living room apartment, looking over her shoulder in a dark navy blue sleeveless lace gown. Her accessories include multiple silver necklaces. She is further embellished with sparkling crystal drop earrings. promptZh: 照片级逼真，8k，高分辨率摄影，一位 22 岁 美丽的 斯堪的纳维亚裔 模特，拥有纤细腰身、修长双腿和金色长发，身材高挑健美，身处公寓客厅中，身着 深海军蓝无袖蕾丝礼服 回眸凝视。她佩戴着多条银色项链，并点缀着闪耀的水晶吊坠耳环。光线柔和且富有氛围感，衬托出她如瓷器般细腻的肌肤，背景为梦幻般的客厅。
